pages.text: To operate a reactor, you must insert fuel into the $(l:unnamednuclear:fuel_channel)Fuel Channels$. Right-click a Fuel Channel with a $(l:unnamednuclear:nuclear_fuel)Fuel Rod$ to insert it. Higher enrichment levels will produce more heat and neutrons.
Assembling the enriched pellets into a Zircaloy-clad fuel rod.
UO2 powder is pressed into small, high-density pellets.
